title: Qdrant payload — anc_records
description: Vector index of ANC corpus information_object rows. One point per IO. Vector is a 384-dim text embedding (default model: all-minilm) of the IO's title + scope_and_content. Hosted at http://localhost:6333/collections/anc_records. Issue #23.

database.description: Source MySQL database. Always 'atom' for the ANC corpus pilot.

title.description: information_object_i18n.title (en culture) — embedded into the vector.

parent_id.description: information_object.parent_id (1 = top-level). Lets discovery RRF wrap a hierarchical-aware re-rank without a JOIN.

slug.description: Public URL slug for the IO; used by discovery to render result links without a DB lookup.

has_scope.description: Whether scope_and_content was non-empty when the embedding was built. Lets ablation runs filter to scope-bearing IOs cheaply.

has_transcript.description: Whether an OCR or AI-generated transcript was available for embedding. Affects vector quality for image-only IOs.
